overview: Full business website for Udayasham Solar Tech — a rooftop solar installation company serving all of India. Includes a public landing page, service booking form, solar product catalog, and an admin-only lead management dashboard.
features: Public landing page with company info, services overview, and contact details
Service booking form for customers to request rooftop solar installation
Solar product catalog with 8 pre-seeded products and category filtering
Admin lead management dashboard protected by Internet Identity login
Lead status tracking (new, contacted, quoted, closed) with delete functionality
Navigation with links to all sections; English with Marathi labels
